name: Agent 365
description: Your AI-powered Agent 365 admin console inside M365 Copilot. View the full agent registry, monitor risky agents, visualize the agent landscape, and take admin actions.

conversation_starters.title: Show agent registry
conversation_starters.text: Show me the full agent registry with all agents in our organization.

conversation_starters.title: Show the agent map
conversation_starters.text: Show me the agent map to visualize all agents by publisher type.

conversation_starters.title: Which agents are at risk?
conversation_starters.text: Show me agents with active risk signals that need attention.

conversation_starters.title: Block a risky agent
conversation_starters.text: I need to block an agent that has been compromised.
